## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## 🖥️ Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 125]
- Node version: [e.g. 20.x]
